rationale: The cited paper is not a generic background match: it directly studies how logo design cues (static visual dynamism) shape brand responses and how cue–brand congruence moderates effects, which is conceptually close to the citing paper’s focus on audio-logo timbral cues, brand personality inference, and cross-modal incongruence. Given this strong construct-level overlap in logo cue effects and fit mechanisms, this pair is plausibly substantive and should be reviewed in full.
